truthfulness_note: gas_ec_studio has surpassed EddyPro in several auditability and delivery-chain areas, but it does not yet implement every EddyPro/SmartFlux feature family.

official_sources.label: LI-COR Eddy Covariance Software
official_sources.used_for: EddyPro positioning as flux processing and collection software.

official_sources.label: LI-COR SmartFlux System
official_sources.used_for: Real-time processed fluxes, raw data, biomet, metadata, diagnostics, GPS/PTP synchronization, transfer, footprint.

official_sources.label: EddyPro .ghg file type
official_sources.used_for: .ghg embedded metadata, dynamic site parameters, biomet, instrument settings, raw columns.

official_sources.label: EddyPro spectral corrections
official_sources.used_for: Horst, Ibrom, Fratini, binned spectra/cospectra, full w/T cospectra requirements.

official_sources.label: EddyPro LI-7200/LI-7700 flux calculations
official_sources.used_for: Level 1/2/3 flux correction sequence, CH4, spectral corrections, density fluctuation corrections.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Read LI-COR .ghg bundles with paired raw data, metadata, and optional biomet files.
capabilities.next_action: Add more real-world LI-COR .ghg fixture variants and column aliases.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Handle the breadth of field .ghg bundle dialects, column labels, metadata variants, and long-running deployments.
capabilities.gap: Synthetic .ghg fixtures now run through RP/FCC/export; broad real-world LI-COR fixture coverage is still limited.
capabilities.next_action: Build a fixture suite from real anonymized LI-COR .ghg files.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Process generic ASCII tabular high-frequency data with configurable columns and missing tokens.
capabilities.next_action: Add more vendor-specific raw text fixtures and field aliases.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Support binary and TOB1/SLT family raw formats.
capabilities.next_action: Implement TOB1 adapter or documented conversion bridge first.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Store site, instrument, gas analyzer, anemometer, raw column, and sampling-chain metadata.
capabilities.next_action: Expand instrument model validation fixtures.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Handle dynamic site parameters such as crop canopy height over time.
capabilities.next_action: Propagate dynamic canopy height deeper into footprint defaults.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Use embedded or external biomet data for flux computation and window summaries.
capabilities.gap: External and .ghg embedded biomet can be loaded and aggregated; biomet is not yet fully used to override all ambient thermodynamic variables.
capabilities.next_action: Wire biomet aggregation into RP ambient parameter selection and diagnostics.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Synchronize high-speed and low-speed data by GPS/PTP in SmartFlux deployments.
capabilities.next_action: Add acquisition clock provenance and optional PTP/GPS offset model.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Produce fully processed real-time site fluxes on embedded/on-site hardware.
capabilities.gap: Desktop/headless real-time style flows exist; no hardened embedded SmartFlux equivalent.
capabilities.next_action: Add daemonized runtime profile and watchdog manifest.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Despike and statistically screen raw data records.
capabilities.next_action: Add more EddyPro fixture parity cases.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Detect and compensate time lags with configurable search/default strategies.
capabilities.next_action: Add gas-specific lag defaults and diagnostics.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Support double/triple rotation, planar fit, and sector-wise planar fit variants.
capabilities.next_action: Persist long-period planar-fit coefficient libraries.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Support sonic head correction, flow distortion, angle-of-attack correction, and known anemometer bug corrections.
capabilities.gap: Sonic coordinate normalization, offsets, common EddyPro model orientation adjustments, Gill WindMaster W-boost handling, and configured angle gain now run before rotation/lag/flux; full Nakai 2006/2012 lookup-table AoA parity and broader instrument-specific calibration libraries are still incomplete.
capabilities.next_action: Add full Nakai AoA calibration tables and fixture parity for Gill/CSAT/Metek/RM Young sonic families.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Support crosswind correction for applicable hygrometers/analyzers.
capabilities.next_action: Add optional crosswind correction family with provenance.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Compute CO2, H2O, latent heat, sensible heat, momentum, u*, and evapotranspiration-related flux outputs.
capabilities.gap: Core CO2/H2O/energy fields exist; full EddyPro Level 0/1/2/3 sequencing still needs broader validation.
capabilities.next_action: Create level-by-level flux correction artifact and tests.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Compute CH4 and other trace gas fluxes, including LI-7700 style correction pathways.
capabilities.gap: CH4 can now be ingested from raw/GHG/headless inputs and processed through an auditable LI-7700 correction sequence v1 with coefficient profile registry provenance; raw WMS line-shape fitting and public real LI-7700 numeric parity fixtures are still incomplete.
capabilities.next_action: Add public real LI-7700 fixture parity datasets and validate registry profiles against instrument-specific EddyPro outputs.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Use mixing-ratio and WPL-style density fluctuation corrections when raw information availability varies.
capabilities.gap: Primary correction mode is selectable; full closed-path cell thermodynamics and level sequencing need expansion.
capabilities.next_action: Add closed-path cell pressure/temperature covariance support.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Support low/high-frequency corrections including Horst, Ibrom, Fratini, measured cospectra, and attenuation assessment.
capabilities.gap: Methods and provenance exist; long-period binned spectra/cospectra library management is incomplete.
capabilities.next_action: Add reusable spectral assessment dataset manager.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Calculate spectra, cospectra, ogives, ensemble averages, and QA/QC outputs.
capabilities.gap: FCC outputs exist; ensemble month-scale assessment and all EddyPro output families are not complete.
capabilities.next_action: Add binned/full spectra export family parity.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Estimate random uncertainty with Mann & Lenschow and Finkelstein & Sims-style methods.
capabilities.next_action: Add more reference datasets for numeric parity.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Estimate flux footprint and provide georeferenced footprint outputs.
capabilities.gap: Kljun/Kormann-Meixner/Hsieh and 2D contours exist; GIS/georeferenced export is incomplete.
capabilities.next_action: Add GeoJSON/GeoTIFF-style footprint export.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: Export standardized network outputs and full result tables.
capabilities.next_action: Add GHG-Europe legacy output if required by target users.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: N/A
capabilities.next_action: Keep audit assertions in CI.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: N/A
capabilities.next_action: Use matrix to guide every future parity sprint.

capabilities.eddypro_requirement: N/A
capabilities.next_action: Add cloud CI artifact screenshots later.
